content.text:
Crafting in Minecraft

Crafting is one of the most important mechanics in Minecraft. It allows you to create tools, weapons, armor, and many other items.

The Crafting Grid:

The basic crafting grid is 2x2, accessible from your inventory. For more complex recipes, you'll need a Crafting Table (3x3 grid).

Essential First Recipes:

  • Crafting Table - 4 wooden planks
  • Sticks - 2 wooden planks (vertical)
  • Wooden Pickaxe - 3 planks + 2 sticks
  • Wooden Sword - 2 planks + 1 stick

Tips:

Always craft a Crafting Table first! It opens up many more crafting possibilities.
